_note: Label Sprint round for root — generated root_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the root cross-section.

hotspots.label: Epiblema (piliferous layer)
hotspots.detail: Outermost layer of the root; bears root hairs that absorb water.

hotspots.label: Cortex
hotspots.detail: Wide zone of parenchyma cells between the epiblema and endodermis.

hotspots.label: Endodermis
hotspots.detail: Innermost cortex layer with the Casparian strip; controls water entry into the stele.

hotspots.label: Pericycle
hotspots.detail: A layer just inside the endodermis; gives rise to lateral roots.

hotspots.label: Xylem
hotspots.detail: Star-shaped conducting tissue at the centre that carries water upward — exarch (facing outward) in roots.

hotspots.label: Phloem
hotspots.detail: Patches lying between the arms of the xylem star; transport food.
